name: 9"x6"x2" Tray Organizer Clear - Brightroom™
description:
Keep your cosmetic items separate and neatly organized with the Tray Organizer from Brightroom™. This clear tray is designed in a rectangle shape with multiple divided compartments to help keep your makeup, jewelry and other items within reach. Made of plastic, this rectangle tray makes a practical addition to your vanity or bath space.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
